OUR CLIENTS

Trusted by Qatar's Leading Contractors

A partial list of the international and regional firms we've supported on landmark projects across the country.

OUR EXPERTISE

Core Services

Six divisions, one accountable partner — from manpower to turnkey delivery.

Manpower Support

Skilled, reliable workforce for construction, maintenance and industrial operations across Qatar.

Equipment Support

A modern heavy-equipment fleet with operators for excavation, lifting and site logistics.

Civil Contracting

Turnkey civil construction: substations, villas, landscaping and infrastructure.

MEP Contracting

Integrated mechanical, electrical and plumbing works for buildings and industrial facilities.

Professional Cleaning

Comprehensive commercial and post-construction cleaning services.

Business Center & Real Estate

Managed office space and real-estate solutions through our Nasser Al Ali Business Center and group real-estate arm.

HEAVY EQUIPMENT

Our Fleet

A modern, owner-operated fleet supporting civil, MEP and site-logistics work across Qatar. Real fleet photography from our yards will replace the placeholders below.

Client to supply photo

Tower Cranes

High-lift capacity for tower and mid-rise construction sites.

Client to supply photo

Excavators & JCBs

Tracked and wheeled excavators for foundation and earthworks.

Client to supply photo

Wheel Loaders

Front-end loaders for aggregate handling and site clearance.

Client to supply photo

Tipper Trucks

Bulk haulage for excavated material, aggregates and concrete.

Client to supply photo

Concrete Mixers

Transit mixers keeping pours on schedule for high-volume projects.

Client to supply photo

Boom & Scissor Lifts

Aerial work platforms for MEP, facade and finishing works at height.

ABOUT US

Two Decades of Building Qatar

Established in Qatar in 2005, Nasser Al Ali Enterprises has grown into one of the Middle East's most successful construction firms, with landmark civil, mechanical and electrical projects across Qatar — including the Doha Metro network, the National Museum of Qatar and Lusail City. Backed by a 5,000+ workforce and joint ventures with leading international contractors, we deliver complex projects at scale and to the highest standards.

Speak with our team Download Company Profile
Nasser Ali J.Z. Al Ali
Chairman
CHAIRMAN'S MESSAGE

A word from our Chairman

With a modest beginning as a manpower support services provider, Nasser Al Ali Enterprises has grown to its current position thanks to our team's commitment and the demand for quality services in Qatar's booming construction sector. Having built our company one block at a time, we established ourselves as one of the most sought-after service providers through our professionalism, dedication and commitment to work.

We know that delivering the results our clients need, when they need them, should never mean sacrificing quality. We place the utmost emphasis on our people, because we firmly believe a company is what its people are — a team of highly skilled, motivated individuals chosen for the right experience. Nasser Al Ali Enterprises is out to make a difference by setting examples.

— Nasser Ali J.Z. Al Ali, Chairman
